title: Motive Partners invests C$100M in Electric Mind
content:
## Motive Partners invests C$100M in Electric Mind
On October 24, 2025, Motive Partners made a C$100 million investment in Electric Mind. The investment will advance the delivery of next-gen solutions for financial institutions, accelerate Electric Mind’s US expansion and develop infrastructure that expands access and transforms how wealth is delivered.
Electric Mind is a business and technology consulting leader in providing innovative, practical solutions driven by engineering excellence. Combining strategy, design, and engineering, Electric Mind transforms complex challenges into opportunities for growth and success. With a focus on diversity and collaboration, the company creates environments where creativity thrives, and bright ideas come to life.
McCarthy Tétrault assisted Electric Mind with a team led by Philip Marcu that included Jake Irwin, Aathmika Kularatnam, Britney Schyf, Husoni Raymond, Pegah Mortazavian, Dan Schechner, Nicholas Geringer, Meghan Noel, Deborah Kay (Business), Justin Lapedus, Zach Kroll (Financial Services), Marc-Philippe Gagnon (Tax), Kelleher Lynch (Pensions), Patrick Pengelly (Employment), Michael Scherman (Privacy and Cybersecurity), Vincent Yip (Intellectual Property), Oliver Borgers (Antitrust), John Boscariol (Trade) and Niusha Arbabi (Real Property).
